analysis_commentary: Anomalous run: only 62 training steps (normal ~340) and 16 probes starting at t=254s (normal t=23). Something delayed buffer-fill or training-start dramatically. Trajectory looks non-collapsed (max 0.02-0.06, illegal 0.97-0.99, top1_legal went positive briefly) but also barely learned — goal metrics far worse than current best (illegal_min=0.97 vs 0.235, aboveU=0 vs 7). Grad norm 34 (fine), pEnt 6.56 (fine). Insufficient training to draw warmup-length conclusions.
